HGSS.340.0000:
Hello, passerby!\f
Have you seen DIGLETT’s Cave?
Normally you can go through it to get\r
to Route 2, but there is a sleeping\r
SNORLAX at the entrance now.\r
Somebody has to wake it up!
HGSS.340.0001:
Hello, passerby!\f
Have you been to DIGLETT’s Cave?
Now that the sleeping SNORLAX is gone,\r
you can go through it to get\r
to Route 2!
